description: The RelayTouchSource component is used to handle the interactions of tip touch sources on the user.

fields.AutoUpdateUser: The user handling updates for thus component
fields.OutOfSightAngle: Buttons outside this angle from the user's center view are considered out of sight.
fields.MaxTouchPenetrationDistance: The max distance of penetration into an item like a physical button before it's not considered pressed anymore.
fields.TipPositionGetter: Refers to a InteractionLaser's sync delegate of the same name.
fields.TipDirectionGetter: Refers to a InteractionLaser's sync delegate of the same name.
fields.TouchTypeGetter: Refers to a InteractionLaser's sync delegate of the same name.
fields.TouchableGetter: Refers to a InteractionLaser's sync delegate of the same name.

usage: Not usually used by the user. However, a TipTouchSource component is.
